title: IPhone 12 debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The iPhone 12 and iPhone 12 Mini are smartphones that were developed and marketed by Apple.

title: IPhone 7 debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The iPhone 7 and iPhone 7 Plus are smartphones that were developed and marketed by Apple.

title: IPhone SE (1st generation) debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The first-generation iPhone SE is a smartphone that was developed and marketed by Apple.

title: IPhone 11 Pro debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The iPhone 11 Pro and iPhone 11 Pro Max are smartphones developed and marketed by Apple.

title: IPhone 3GS debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The iPhone 3GS, stylized as iPhone 3G🅂, is a smartphone that was developed and marketed by Apple.

title: Nokia N95 debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Nokia N95 and Nokia N95 8GB are high-end mobile phones produced by Nokia as part of their former Nseries line of multimedia mobile devices.

title: N-Gage debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The N-Gage is a mobile device combining features of a cellular phone and a handheld game system developed by Nokia, released on 7 October 2003.

title: Samsung Galaxy S4 debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Samsung Galaxy S4 is a series of high-end Android smartphones produced by Samsung Electronics as the fourth smartphone family of the Samsung Galaxy S series and was first shown publicly on March 14, 2013, at Samsung Mobile Unpacked in New York City.

title: Xperia Play debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Xperia Play is a slider-style smartphone with elements of a handheld game console produced by Sony Ericsson.

title: Samsung Galaxy A10 debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Samsung Galaxy A10 is an entry-level Android smartphone developed by Samsung Electronics.

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip is a foldable smartphone developed and designed by Samsung Electronics as part of the Galaxy Z series, released on February 14, 2020.

title: Galaxy Nexus debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Galaxy Nexus (GT-I9250) is a touchscreen Android smartphone co-developed by Google and Samsung Electronics.

title: Samsung Galaxy Note II debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Samsung Galaxy Note II is an Android phablet smartphone developed, marketed and manufactured by Samsung Electronics.

title: Nexus 5X debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Nexus 5X is an Android smartphone manufactured by LG Electronics, co-developed with and marketed by Google as part of its Nexus line of flagship devices.

title: Samsung Galaxy S III mini debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Samsung Galaxy S III Mini is a touchscreen-based, slate-sized smartphone designed and manufactured by Samsung.

title: Pocophone F1 debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Xiaomi Pocophone F1 is a smartphone developed by Xiaomi Inc, a Chinese electronics company based in Beijing.

title: Samsung Galaxy S4 Mini debuts
subtitle: Cell Phone
fact: The Samsung Galaxy S4 Mini is an Android smartphone developed by the Korean manufacturer Samsung Electronics.
